TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tjanavakung, title = Tjanavakung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjanavakung} }

S.FORM: = Tjanavakung = Gaga mniq Pingtung Macyasyang ka alang Tjanavakung. 44 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 116 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 114 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 2 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan91%, Rukai3%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = tɟana*akuŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ maʦjasjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟana*akuŋ. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, ɾukai*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjanavakung = Gaga mniq Pingtung Macyasyang ka alang Tjanavakung. 44 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 116 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 114 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 2 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan91%, Rukai3%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = tɟana*akuŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ maʦjasjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟana*akuŋ. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, ɾukai*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
